cards.body: Find eligible hotel supply through Wink.

cards.body: Create a bookable asset in Studio or run a WinkLinks storefront.

cards.title: Share
cards.body: Share through social, email, QR, campaign pages, communities, or partner channels.

cards.title: Checkout
cards.body: Guests move from recommendation to hotel-branded checkout.

items.question: Who can become a Wink Partner?
items.answer: A Wink Partner can be a creator, KOL agency, DMC, event organizer, community, agency, bank, loyalty program, super app, platform, or other company that can create hotel booking demand.

items.question: Do Partners need to own hotels?
items.answer: No. Partners create or route demand. Hotels control the supply, rates, availability, and guest relationship.

items.question: How do Partners share hotel inventory?
items.answer: Partners can use Studio and WinkLinks to create bookable links, storefronts, cards, lists, maps, and campaign pages from eligible hotel supply.

items.question: How are bookings tracked?
items.answer: Wink tracks every booking from partner asset to confirmed stay with 6-month attribution per click, so the partner is credited even when the guest books weeks later.

items.question: Can larger platforms integrate directly?
items.answer: Yes. Larger platforms can use developer access for search, booking, payment, webhook, and reporting workflows.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
